implementation_checklist: Enforce strict provenance and taint controls
Trace each integrated requirement to a verification signal

traceability_matrix.statement: Integrated single-agent objective for Bookkeeping: The system must support multiple accounts and categories Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance shee...
The system shall satisfy: The system must support multiple accounts and categories
The system shall satisfy: Users must be able to generate financial reports such as balance sheets, income statements, and cash flow statements
The system shall satisfy: The system must ensure double-entry bookkeeping principles are followed and maintain an audit trail of all transactions
The system shall satisfy: The system must support multiple currencies and handle currency conversion
The system shall satisfy: A bookkeeping system must record financial transactions including income and expenses
